review_title: Complete Project Management system.
description: Lots of work goes into developing and agency process; It's often a point of differentiation from one agency to another. Screendragon took our business objectives and created a custom platform that activated our unique process and language on top of a seemingly endless list of powerful features. The end result was a flexible, scalable, centralized project management solution that gave us operational visibility across clients and project details. The no-code Admin tool gave further access to customize any aspect of the platform as our business evolved. In the end, what we created together incorporated users across every location, department, partner agency and client.
author: Greg H.
pros: 1. Access to Powerful dynamic forms which, consequently, is how you evolve from 20 forms to 1. Our final "Brief" accommodated print, digital, strategy, media inputs and specificity that formerly required 7 forms. 2. Sophisticated workflows move our forms and files along approval process' that ensure review, annotations and approvals are captured. 3. Custom Rate Card matrices are not common in this space and gave us the ability to create deliverable based rates in addition to standard role based rates. 4. Resource management at he project and portfolio level. Tasks and task management are tied to budgets and are instrumental in how we establish tasks priorities, deadlines and how our resources are assigned. Ultimately, our project initiation process passively generates tasks and a complete picture of how our teams are resourced. From there we just needed to move work around to resources that showed capacity. If all of that isn't enough.. add amazing support to the list. Live support is readily accessible and, as an organization, Screendragon is incredibly receptive to developing new functionality to support their client needs. Amazing partners.
cons: As with any system, be wary of over-engineering your process. We often get in our own way on the road to efficiency.

review_title: SuperDragon
author: Eduardo B.
pros: Once you learn how to use it, it is an amazing tool for proyect management. I could organize my team more efficiently and keep tabs and updates on the tasks each member si working on.
cons: It was not so easy or straightforward to learn the different menus and workflow of the application. The many features make it difficult for a first timer as it is not so intuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Good experience and learning opportunity
description: Overall, it was a positive experience where I learned a lot about marketing operations and project workflows.
author: Waldor R.
pros: I liked working with a platform focused on marketing workflows and collaborating with different teams.
cons: Sometimes processes could feel a bit slow because of the complexity of large projects and the number of approvals required across different teams.

review_title: Simple tool that keeps projects organized
description: Overall it’s been a good experience. Once you get used to it, it really helps manage projects and keep teams aligned.
author: Adriana C.
pros: I like that everything is in one place, projects, tasks, estimates and time tracking. It helps keep things organized and makes it easier to see the status of projects.
cons: Sometimes it can feel a bit slow and not very intuitive, especially for new users. Some features take time to figure out.

review_title: Best all-in-one work management platform for creative teams
description: Great knowledgeable team, easy to work with and so accommodating... and a fantastic product to match!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's a brilliant all-in-work management tool for creative teams - the best out there in my experience. We use it to manage our creative workflow - everything from creative briefs, task management, resource forecasting and automated approval workflows for our creative assets. It has everything you need and more!
cons: Nothing but looking forward to some future updates due to be rolled out over the next few months, which will make Screendragon even better.

review_title: Screendragon transformed the way we work for the better!
description: The level of customer service from Screendragon is outstanding, the team there really go above and beyond to support you and this doesn’t just stop after implementation. We have had a great partnership with them from day one and that continues today.
author: Tracy J.
pros: We are using Screendragon as a complete work management tool – project, resource, budget and workflow management. I’ve never come across a tool that does it all and does it all so well. Screendragon does!
cons: It’s a powerful system, the number of features can be overwhelming but at the same time, that’s probably more of a plus than a minus too.

review_title: Screendragon is a comprehensive solution that helps us manage projects between JWT and our client.
author: Romy P.
pros: We manage every project for our client, regardless of project type, using Screendragon and have replaced over 70% of project based emails and file transfers. Tracking reviews and approvals through online file annotations provides a clear audit trail of when files are delivered, what the revision comments are and who completed final approvals. We have streamlined and improved the oversight of all projects allowing for team members to jump on and off projects without managing lengthy hand-over and tracking of old email correspondence. The reporting features are powerful in the creation of single project or large integrated campaign calendars, real-time status reports on any project, standard monthly reports on asset deliveries by project and media type and comprehensive budget reports across all projects. All project details are stored and enable projections for annual planning on future projects. Using Screendragon has put us in a position for streamlined communication, clear visibility on current project and financial status, historical learnings from past projects, auditable workflows for reviews and approvals and comprehensive reporting.
cons: While the flexibility of Screendragon is an overall strength, it has proven to be a challenge at times. The software is so robust that we often aren't aware of functionality until we have a specific problem we're trying to solve. It would be helpful to understand the full capabilities up front so we can we be more proactive with our solution.

review_title: Complete tool
description: Good technical supporto, always open to develop new features and matching with our needs. We work as if we belonged to the same team.
author: Laura D.
pros: Integration with other platforms, multiple functionalities, and technical support.
cons: Sometimes it takes too long to develope new funtionalities, and we need to wait until it's approved for all the platform and customers, but it's good though that they understand that matching our needs becomes others benefits.

review_title: Screendragon is a good project collaboration software.
description: Ability to categorize and organize assets to share across a Marketing Communications community; unlimited file storage and rapid downloading; control of workflows
author: Lori M.
pros: Visual project tracking; excellent and responsive customer support. The Screendragon team works hard to help customize the interface and functionality for users. Excellent storage capacity, and relatively quick downloading.
cons: Although strong as project management software, it is a bit less robust at document management and retrieval. Searching is via an open-text field;. files can be organized according to a behind-the-scenes directory structure, however.

review_title: Fast and Great Support Team
description: My overall experience with Screendragon has been so great that I recommend them with my eyes closed. Great team and always accessible. Also, they will explain and train you with patience. Working with Screendragon has exceeded my expectations.
author: Katia Q.
pros: I LOVE this software because it was made exactly based on our needs, process and clients. I am in Miami Florida and my Support team is in Ireland. They are always accessible and ready to help for any new request. Implementation time is always quick and effective.
cons: Since this is a customizable software there might be some features that are not available at the moment but the good things is that they always take those in consideration to improve the software in the future.

review_title: Satisfying, engaging, supportive and knowledgeable.
description: To enable communications and engagement channels to open up within our business. Personally I have learnt how to add coding to be able to layer video and image files on to a web based product.
author: Martin K.
pros: For us as a business I find it very easy to use both from an administrative and end user perspective. I like the way you can navigate around the software easily and it doesn't require a lot of effort to be able locate information. Additionally I found the way our branding was incorporated into the software made it 'come to life' and added real value to the overall user experience.
cons: I do feel that certain areas could do with system improvements, for example, being able to add Instagram to a social media feed and having an easier way to be able to play videos and make images larger without the need for coding behind the scenes which can be quite time consuming as an administrator when building content.

review_title: Very Happy and would recommend as a solution
description: Transparency with all projects and a multi solution site in a single instance
author: Anthony M.
pros: Multiple solutions within one site (Cloud Storage / Project Management / Annotation / complete transparency & accountability with any project / Reporting) / the fantastic customer facing attitude of all of the ScreenDragon staff
cons: Im just typing this line due to the character limit on the survey, but i cannot think of any cons using ScreenDragon in my experience

review_title: Hyper Local Promotion Activation
description: Screendragon was an excellent partner. Great at problem solving. Terrific engagement and solution development.
author: Larry B.
pros: Clean and user friendly interface. Easy to grasp and engage.
cons: Customized solution - took time to build out.

review_title: Fantastic Project Management and Project Data Software
description: Screendragon is a great company to work with. Great software. Great people.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use & navigate. Very user friendly. Fantastic user and administrator customization tools Easy to generate & customize reports & download data into Excel. Easy to customize forms, performs mathematics between fields. Easy to create fields, new forms and new processes without being a programmer. Can make changes to forms, processes, modify fields, put them into live production environment within minutes without any IT support. Fantastic ability to immediately preview changes before actively putting them into production. The Screendragon company support is always available, get to know the team by name, Representatives and contacts are assigned to your company, listens to suggestions, answers questions right away, provides great alternatives and even better ideas, solves any issues, takes the time to teach. They are very willing to modify the core software based on your suggestions and needs. Great company and people to work with. They have a "Can-do" attitude. Friendly people.
cons: It's a really a great software. It currently has the ability to generate graphs such as pie graphs, etc. It could expand functionality in this area.

review_title: ScreenDragon - Brief Submission & Approval made easy
description: Overall the experience has been very positive. The ScreenDragon support team are very quick at responding and go above and beyond to help solve any issues or to make any tweaks to the setup (no matter how minor they may be). The software has allowed us to ensure all briefs are of high quality and all the necessary stakeholders have visibility of activity which is vital working in a global team.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is extremely flexible and the setup can be tailored to meet your exact needs. The product development team are always looking at ways to improve the tool and our direct feedback has been taken on board and implemented into updates. We use the tool for brief submission and approval - the tool provides a well structured workflow which ensure all briefs are approved by key stakeholders and ScreenDragon is considered the place of truth where both clients and market teams can login to get the most accurate updates on brief submissions and brief responses.
cons: The tool is easy to use the more you use it and explore its features. ScreenDragon does have a lot of features which means it can be complex - however this is very dependent on the setup you choose. As there are a lot of features and workflow options it takes some time to get this setup and working correctly. We had a few tweaks made along the way to ensure the tool worked for us, i don't necessarily think this is solely down to the software but more us trying to strike a balance with what we wanted out of the tool and how complex we would need to make the setup.

review_title: Effective Tool
description: Screendragon expertly combines resourcing management and budget tracking to provide a full end to end project management.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It suits to our unique business challenges and provides the right solutions to help us manage our projects and people. It interfaces with our data warehouse well to provide us with an excellent front end solution to our resourcing and project tracking needs. They are also great business partners who listen to our needs and have flexible enough technologies to accommodate us.
cons: The UI has a learning curve but it makes sense once you use it enough.

review_title: SD Review
description: I enjoy working with the SD people. Always friendly on calls, but you also get honesty from them and not just 'yes' to everything.
author: Doug S.
pros: I find many of the products out there to be unnecessarily complicated, and this one is simple and sensible.
cons: I'd prefer better ability to wall people off from accessing data we don't want them to see. Like if I didn't want LA employees to be able to code time to a NY job. The ability to cross companies/locations is nice, but would be great to be able to silo them as well.

review_title: Helps with Project Management
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We have weekly meetings with the board so we can present our account details like timeline of project, developments and highlights or milestones that we have achieved. Since our meetings are done weekly, it is important to have a program that can help me manage the tasks and projects we have. I use Screendragon which has been helping me a lot with my work. It enables me to manage my projects accordingly. I can also avail of their resources which helps me improve the way I work. Once we have input our tasks, we have the ability to read the reports which can keep us on track as to where we are heading.
cons: Some of the features offered in this software are a bit too complicated and I can’t seem to understand how it works. It took me a bit of time to learn the ropes.

review_title: Absolutely love working with the Screendragon team, they are my favorite vendor to work with!
author: Laurie B.
pros: the ability to use off the shelf and customize admin tools allow process owners to make changes to workflow user friendly dashboards reflects work status report builder allows for standard and custom reporting ability to create teams and see work across the team external access to solution allowing agencies to submit ability to measure rework/resubmissions ability to annotate on both pdf and video visibility to owner of annotation ability to have private conversations within solution Screendragon will develop training materials and facilitate training the look and feel is consistent across all of the workflows
cons: there isn't audio with an Irish accent! our solution was not intended for storage of the final versions.
author_profession: IT Business Process Architecture, Sr. Principal

review_title: Game Changer
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Brings agency OS into one platform and is agile enough for multiple agencies to live within the one platform. Interface is slick.
cons: Lacks mobile app; while you can login to software from Mobile and functionality is there.
author_profession: Senior Vice President, Director of Client Operations

review_title: Screendragon is great for our business
author: Luke H.
pros: It allows our resource team get a quick snap shot of what resource may be available for a project sitting within our pipeline. This has been integral with our company working on more global projects with up to 4 markets across the project at the same time. The budget management tab also provides our teams an easy to read and updated view of current spend across their projects, which helps them stay within budget and deliver increased profitability.
cons: When a project runs for a long period of time, with tasks stretching for many months, it's not ideal that the time allocated for staff on that particular task is averaged out. Some tasks could be front loaded with 90% of this done within the first month, and 10% not completing until month two, so if there was an option to drag and drop hours into particular time periods of the task that would allow us to see an even more accurate picture.

review_title: Great customer experience and really good tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use High customization Quick turnaround for changes Excellent customer support
cons: N/A

review_title: User Centric Functionality at the heart
author: Emma D.
pros: Simple to use, user journey is intuitive and easy and fits well with our business needs for the software internally. The recent upgrade has had extremely positive feedback across the business by improving the ease through which the content can be shared and utilised across the business.
cons: No cons to be noted - we needed to understand how the software could best suit our needs but once the brief was aligned no issues.

review_title: A robust and flexible tool with a stellar support team.
description: We use the tool to mange incoming requests. Our clients submit requests via the tool.
author: Mark S.
pros: What I liked most was working with the support team to customize the tool and the reports. Any time I wanted a new report or to modify the form, the team were extremely responsive and helpful. Beyond just making requested updates, they would also give me the skills and knowledge to create my own reports and make changes on my own. Support team in particular was incredibly generous with their time and knowledge, and wonderful to work with.
cons: The only think I can think of is that pages can take longer than we'd like to open.

review_title: Commercial Calendar online Platform
description: Outstanding experience, using this experience with Screendragon as a comparison vs other developers. All the process (discovery, design, implementation) they walked with us, very receptive of any adjustments and providing the correct feedback in order to have a better platform. Any questions or requests were answered swiftly (It was usual to see the adjustments by the next business day) and I am confident that any project with them will reach their objective.
author: Fernando G.
pros: The base platform is very powerful and allows for a lot of customization. The Screendragon team is very knowledgeable on how to tweak it and provide timely input on how to better do things.
cons: Nothing. Anything that we didn't like (design, process, etc) was quickly adjusted by the Screendragon team
